messages.subject: [R-sig-Epi] Competing risks
messages.body_plain:
Hello!
Does anybody know, whether R offers the possibility to carry out 
competing risks analysis with left-truncated data (late entries)?

Thanks a lot!

Klaus.

----------------------------------------------------
 Klaus Langohr

messages.from_name: Pedro Emmanuel Alvarenga Americano do Brasil
messages.subject: [R-sig-Epi] R-sig-Epi Digest, Vol 7, Issue 1
messages.body_plain:
Klaus,

If U are talking about survival analysis, R are able to do everything
(or almost). Cox models, extended cox models with time dependent
variables, multiple outcomes analysis, competing risks models,
residual ajustments, model ajustments and even fragility models.
Everythig depends on how your data is organized! These stuff are in a
library called "survival".

Pedro E. A. A. do Brasil
Departamento de Epidemiologia e Antropologia
Instituto de Pesquisa Evandro Chagas
Funda??o Oswaldo Cruz


2006/7/22, r-sig-epi-request at stat.math.ethz.ch
